title: TicketStateLLM
description: Token-minified ticket state with shortened keys, emitted by `show`/`list`/`ready` under `--output llm` (one minified JSON object; list/ready emit one per line / NDJSON). Produced by ticket_reducer.llm_format.to_llm. Null/empty fields are stripped, so most keys are optional.
